ratings.comment: He targets students based on race. Gives abstract answers and reduces grade if you request for a regrade. Funnily,it was Indians and Asians that were the top performers in the game but still graded them the lowest in class, he basically messed with their grades in written reports. Please visit scores of Spring 2024 and see for yourself. Worst human
Probably the rudest and the most unapproachable professor I ever had. Do not take any of his course or go to him for any help.

He never released the guidelines for grading and told us that he would curve in the end, which he did not. He is extremely rude and not welcoming when you ask him for help or guidance and always replies with "I do not know, I can not guarantee". Upon asking for the grading guidelines he reduced our grades. Won't recommend taking any of his courses.

Fabulous professor! So so good at lecturing and actually teaching the subject matter, and you can really tell that he wants to be there and is actually interested in teaching, not just doing it out of obligation. Fantastic vibes too. He's great at giving help when needed, but doing so in a way that prompts you to do your own thinking.
